pathways.name: Swift 6 Migration Path
pathways.description: Adopt the Swift 6 language mode with full data-race safety. Start with the language overview, learn the migration strategy hands-on, then go deep on noncopyable types and performance.

pathways.name: Apple Intelligence Path
pathways.description: Integrate Apple Intelligence features into your app. Start with the ML overview, adopt Writing Tools and Genmoji, then connect your app to Siri via App Intents and Assistant Schemas.

pathways.name: visionOS 2 Path
pathways.description: Build mature visionOS 2 apps with new volumes, immersive spaces, and RealityKit features. Cover scene management, ARKit object tracking, and cross-platform RealityKit.

pathways.name: SwiftUI Modernization Path
pathways.description: Master SwiftUI's biggest API expansion in years -- custom containers, the new TabView, animations bridging UIKit/AppKit, and the @Entry macro.

pathways.name: Swift Testing Adoption Path
pathways.description: Adopt Swift Testing -- the new default test framework in Xcode 16. Learn the basics, then go further with parameterization, parallelism, and tag-based organization.

pathways.name: ML Model Deployment Path
pathways.description: Deploy your own ML models on device. Start with the framework overview, train on Apple GPUs, prepare with Core ML Tools, then deploy with Core ML, MPS Graph, or BNNS Graph.

pathways.name: App Intents Ecosystem Path
pathways.description: Make your app a first-class citizen of Siri, Spotlight, Shortcuts, and Apple Intelligence. Cover the foundation, what's new in 2024, and the assistant schema bridge.

pathways.name: Spatial Media Creation Path
pathways.description: Capture, detect, and present spatial photos and video on iPhone 15 Pro and Vision Pro. Cover the formats, capture API, and presentation choices.

pathways.name: Xcode 16 & Tools Path
pathways.description: Master Xcode 16's new predictive code completion, explicitly built modules, RealityKit debugger, LLDB improvements, and Instruments flame graphs.

pathways.name: UIKit Modernization Path
pathways.description: Bring your UIKit app up to date with new tab/sidebar APIs, fluid zoom transitions, SwiftUI animations, and document launch experience.

pathways.name: Monetization & StoreKit Path
pathways.description: Modern monetization with StoreKit 2: new SubscriptionStoreView APIs, win-back offers, server-side analytics, and Xcode StoreKit testing.

pathways.name: Controls, Capture & Lock Screen Path
pathways.description: Extend your app to system spaces -- custom Control Center widgets, Action Button integration, and lock-screen camera capture.

pathways.name: Accessibility & Design Path
pathways.description: Build inclusive apps with new accessibility APIs, dynamic type, and visionOS design principles. Covers SwiftUI accessibility, dynamic type, and design.
